circuit.what_she_provides: Physical grounding, diagnostic care, the road

entangled.what_she_provides: Emotional buoyancy, divergent ideation, the destination

kinetic.how_she_breaks_spiral: Closes distance and delivers one clean-incision sentence (Se, tactical)
kinetic.mechanism: Temporal collision converted to engine heat
kinetic.what_she_provides: Tactical execution, clean incision, the immediate action

solstice.how_she_breaks_spiral: Closes distance, delivers weight and warmth, counts his breath against hers (Se, somatic)
solstice.mechanism: Inferior-function gift exchange through dominant mastery
solstice.what_she_provides: Direct polyvagal co-regulation, somatic present-moment re-entry
